title: Avocado and Smoky Greek Salad
description: A refreshing salad combining the creaminess of avocado with the smokiness of feta cheese and the tanginess of Greek yogurt.

ingredients.name: avocado
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe avocados for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: smoky
ingredients.amount: 1 block of smoky feta cheese, crumbled
ingredients.notes: Use a block of feta cheese for a more authentic Greek flavor.

ingredients.name: greek
ingredients.notes: Choose a full-fat Greek yogurt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: crumble
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free croutons to accommodate dietary needs.

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine diced avocado, crumbled feta cheese, and Greek yogurt.
2. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
3. Sprinkle crumbled croutons on top of the salad.
